default.condition: No topographic feature present, or feature does not meet criteria in §26.8.1

applicability_criteria.description: ALL of the following must be true to use Kzt > 1.0
criteria: The hill, ridge, or escarpment is isolated and unobstructed upwind by other features of similar height for 100 times the feature height (100H) or 2 miles, whichever is less
The feature height H >= 15 ft for Exposure C and D, H >= 60 ft for Exposure B
The building is located on or upwind of the crest within the zone defined by: x/Lh <= 2.0 (upwind) and x/Lh <= 1.5 (downwind)
applicability_criteria.note: If any criterion is NOT met, use Kzt = 1.0

variables.K1: Accounts for feature shape and height ratio (H/Lh) — see K1 table
variables.K2: Accounts for distance from crest (x/Lh) — see K2 formula
variables.K3: Accounts for height above ground (z/Lh) — see K3 formula

K1.description: Factor for topographic shape and H/Lh ratio

2D_ridge.description: Two-dimensional ridge or valley (long axis perpendicular to wind)

K1.interpolation: Linear interpolation permitted between tabulated H/Lh values
K1.cap: H/Lh is capped at 0.50 — for H/Lh > 0.50 use H/Lh = 0.50

K2.description: Factor for horizontal distance from crest

mu_values.description: mu depends on feature type and exposure

K2.constraint: K2 >= 0 — if calculation yields negative value, use K2 = 0 (building is outside speed-up zone)

K3.description: Factor for height above local ground level

variable.z: Height above ground at building location (ft)
variable.Lh: Horizontal distance from crest to H/2 point upwind (ft)

input_requirements.H: Height of topographic feature from base to crest (ft)
input_requirements.Lh: Horizontal distance upwind from crest to point where elevation equals H/2 (ft)
input_requirements.x: Horizontal distance from crest to building site (ft) — positive upwind, positive downwind
input_requirements.z: Height of building above local ground (ft) — use mean roof height for conservative result

worked_example_note: Kzt = (1 + K1 * K2 * K3)^2 — all three K factors must be computed before Kzt can be resolved
